CVE-2018-11489.title: The DGifDecompressLine function in dgif_lib.c in GIFLIB (possibly ...
CVE-2018-11489.summary: The DGifDecompressLine function in dgif_lib.c in GIFLIB (possibly version 3.0.x), as later shipped in cgif.c in sam2p 0.49.4, has a heap-based buffer overflow because a certain CrntCode array index is not checked. This will lead to a denial of service or possibly unspecified other impact.

CVE-2021-40633.title: A memory leak (out-of-memory) in gif2rgb in util/gif2rgb.c in gif ...
CVE-2021-40633.summary: A memory leak (out-of-memory) in gif2rgb in util/gif2rgb.c in giflib 5.1.4 allows remote attackers trigger an out of memory exception or denial of service via a gif format file.

CVE-2025-31344.title: Heap-based Buffer Overflow vulnerability in openEuler giflib on L ...
CVE-2025-31344.summary:
Heap-based Buffer Overflow vulnerability in openEuler giflib on Linux. This vulnerability is associated with program files gif2rgb.C.

This issue affects giflib: through 5.2.2.
